title: asplenium fontanum var. exiguum
intro: Asplenium fontanum var. exiguum, also known as the lesser-rabbit's-foot fern, is a variety of the Asplenium fontanum plant, a type of fern native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and improving digestive health. Herbal preparations of Asplenium fontanum var. exiguum typically involve infusions of the plant's leaves or roots, which can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or added to other remedies.
